examples: People need basic education if they are to become employable.
It's very easy to spend four years majoring in English literature and come out no more employable than you were before you went in.
It is unlikely that Generation Z will be done with education at 18 or 21; they will need to be constantly upskilling throughout their career to stay employable.
All but the marginally employable and the over-55s are already gainfully employed, thank you very much.
The company's training arm said of 2, 280 applicants to its apprenticeship scheme, 81% were not employable.
